name: simplify_logout
description: Simplify logout to a single action that signs out AND removes the server, since the native login override eliminates the intermediate OAuth screen

replacements.find:
struct SignOutConfirmationSheet: View {
    let onSignOut: () -> Void
    let onSignOutAndRemove: () -> Void
    let onCancel: () -> Void

// Action buttons
            VStack(spacing: Spacing.sm) {
                signOutButton(
                    title: "Sign Out",
                    subtitle: "Keep server connection",
                    icon: "arrow.right.circle",
                    action: onSignOut,
                    index: 0
                )

                signOutButton(
                    title: "Sign Out & Remove Server",
                    subtitle: "Clear all connection data",
                    icon: "trash.circle",
                    action: onSignOutAndRemove,
                    index: 1
                )
